name: Pan American Energy Corp.
description: Pan American Energy Corp. (CSE: PNRG | OTCQB: PAANF | FSE: SS6) is focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of land holdings prospective for critical minerals and rare earth elements, including cesium, tantalum, niobium, phosphorus and lithium—resources for North America’s efforts to secure domestic supply chains essential to industrial growth and national security. The company is headquartered in Calgary, Alberta, and actively manages projects such as the Tharsis Project and the Big Mack Project to advance its portfolio of critical mineral assets.
